content:
# Environmental Geoscience

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]] contributed to the theme of Environmental Geoscience

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] addressed environmental concerns by developing a method to remove heavy metals from water.

- [[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011]] applied environmental-geoscience to assess groundwater contamination on Tarout Island.

- [[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]] analyzed the environmental impact of land reclamation on coastal ecosystems.

- [[2014-adebayo|Adebayo, 2014]] addressed environmental-geoscience issues regarding MTBE contamination and fly ash reuse.

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] addressed environmental-geoscience issues through water treatment research.

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] addressed environmental-geoscience by repurposing waste tires for environmental protection.

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] applied green chemistry principles using solar energy for synthesis and remediation.

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] investigated the phytoremediation potential of local plants to treat contaminated water.

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] studied environmental-geoscience issues related to sewage pollution in coastal areas.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] investigated foraminifera as indicators of environmental change in the Gulf.

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] Referenced in this thesis.

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] analyzed environmental/climatic factors to determine mosquito distribution.

- [[2016-sameh|Sameh, 2016]] addressed environmental-geoscience issues related to groundwater contamination from oil production.

- [[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017]] investigated fly ash as a waste product for environmental remediation.

- [[2018-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2018]] addressed the problem of MTBE contamination in groundwater systems.

- [[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020]] applied environmental-geoscience to address CO2 sequestration as a solution for global warming.

- [[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020]] addressed ammonia as a significant water pollutant in aquatic environments.

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] addressed water pollution from industrial wastewater as a global challenge.

- [[2021-siddiq|Siddiq, 2021]] applied environmental-geoscience to address arsenic contamination.

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] investigated air quality as a component of environmental geoscience.

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] addressed environmental-geoscience by developing a treatment method for hazardous industrial waste.

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] applied environmental-geoscience to assess how hypersalinity affects marine life.

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] addressed environmental challenges in arid agroecosystems through improved irrigation management.

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] addressed the remediation of groundwater contamination.

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] applied environmental geoscience to evaluate carbon mineralization techniques.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Environmental Geoscience ([[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]])

- CNT-based materials are promising for removing various organic and inorganic pollutants. ([[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009, p. 56]])

- Identified specific chemical contaminants like Xylenes and Trichloroethylene in local water sources. ([[2011-alsadeq|Alsadeq, 2011, p. 182]])

- Identified significant degradation of marine habitats due to urban development. ([[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012, p. 12]])

- The use of local industrial waste (fly ash) serves as a form of waste reuse, enhancing the management process in the Kingdom. ([[2014-adebayo|Adebayo, 2014, p. 17]])

- Addressed heavy metal contamination in aqueous systems. ([[2015-musa|Musa, 2015, p. 114]])

- Waste tire disposal is a major global environmental issue. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015, p. 7]])

- Utilized organic dyes as a greener, safer alternative to toxic metal-based catalysts. ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015, p. 28]])

- The study demonstrated that both B. maritimus and P. australis are viable candidates for treating heavy metal and organic pollution. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015, p. 96]])

- All three outfalls were found to serve as important sources of inorganic nutrient into the coastal waters. ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 14]])

- Environmental parameters like pH, salinity, and oxygen levels significantly influence foraminiferal distribution. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 39]])

- Referenced in this thesis. ([[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]])

- Temperature, relative humidity, and rainfall were identified as key determinants for mosquito survival and abundance. ([[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016, p. 20]])

- Groundwater sources in areas with intense oil and gas exploration are highly susceptible to contamination. ([[2016-sameh|Sameh, 2016, p. 23]])

- Fly ash (FA) is an industrial waste that can be utilized for environmentally-friendly applications. ([[2017-olabemiwo|Olabemiwo, 2017, p. 73]])

- SDAC provided a viable method for treating water contaminated with hazardous chemicals. ([[2018-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2018, p. 12]])

- CO2 is the main compound identified as affecting the stability of Earth's climate, representing 62.5% of all greenhouse gases. ([[2020-abdallah|Abdallah, 2020, p. 22]])

- Ammonia leads to the formation of nitrite and nitrate, which are also considered serious water pollutants. ([[2020-ghazwani|Ghazwani, 2020, p. 1]])

- Water pollution is a major environmental concern requiring advanced materials for remediation. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 28]])

- Integration of geophysical monitoring (SIP) with biochar treatment provides a robust system for large-scale decontamination. ([[2021-siddiq|Siddiq, 2021, p. 19]])

- Climate change impacts on local air quality were quantified using dispersion modeling. ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022, p. 15]])

- The EO process provided a cost-effective way to treat spent caustic compared to traditional disposal methods. ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023, p. 81]])

- Morphological deformities in foraminifera are likely a result of salinity-induced constraints. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 57]])

- Optimized resource management for water-scarce regions. ([[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024, p. 14]])

- CAC provided an effective solution for removing MTBE and BTEX from contaminated water. ([[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025, p. 86]])

- Proposed as an efficient technology for Saudi Arabia's net-zero goals. ([[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025, p. 14]])
